package rulecoverage

func NegativeShouldbindbodywithWhenSingleBindIsEnough() string {
    ruleID := "shouldbindbodywith_when_single_bind_is_enough"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that use ShouldBindBodyWith(...) even though only one body bind is observed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
